name: sprinty
description: Disciplined sprint workflow for Codex CLI: dashboard-at-start, feature subsprints, artifacts, follow-ups, spikes, dependency graphs, coverage gates, changelogs, and change maps.

interface.shortDescription: Run dashboard-backed, ledgered development sprints from Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Sprinty gives Codex CLI a sprint workflow with server-minted IDs, feature subsprints, normal item gates, dashboard-at-start guidance, sprint artifacts, bug-id follow-ups, spike subsprints with conclusions, dependency graphs with cycle detection, Git-backed change maps, Markdown changelogs, and coverage-required close gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Sprinty to run this implementation as a disciplined sprint.
Call Sprinty info first, then start or continue the sprint with explicit git_dir and data_dir before calling dashboard() and sharing the local URL.
Track each feature as a subsprint, use artifact_add/list/amend/deprecate for durable outputs, record follow_up entries with bug ids, and use spike/spike_conclude for investigations.
Resolve every item with passing gates and a commit, then close with coverage.
